# Ashwin Sathian

> Full-stack engineer and engineering leader. Seven years building SaaS platforms at scale. AI-augmented engineering practice.

## About

Ashwin Sathian is a Lead Engineer based in Kochi, Kerala, India. He currently leads engineering for HighLevel's Funnels, Websites, and Webinars products — three core revenue surfaces of a $1.5B+ ARR SaaS platform serving 60,000+ marketing agencies worldwide.

Prior to HighLevel, he spent five years at Penny Software, a B2B procurement SaaS platform, growing from Full Stack Developer to Lead Engineer. In that time he architected the core multi-tenant platform, implemented RBAC and tenancy isolation, led a cross-functional engineering team of ~12 engineers, optimised critical API paths to under 200ms, and shaped the data patterns that held as the platform scaled to handle $1B+ in procurement GTV.

Ashwin practises AI-augmented engineering — using AI tooling including Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, and LLM APIs to work at higher altitude: validating architectural decisions faster, accelerating implementation cycles, and raising the quality ceiling of his output.

## Current Role

**Lead Engineer — Funnels, Websites, Webinars**
HighLevel · March 2026 – Present

Leading the engineering organisation for three of HighLevel's core revenue products — funnel builder, website builder, and webinar platform — serving 60,000+ marketing agencies worldwide. Responsible for technical direction, cross-squad alignment, architecture patterns, engineering standards, and release discipline across a $1.5B+ ARR SaaS environment.

## Career History

- **HighLevel** — Lead Engineer, Funnels/Websites/Webinars (Mar 2026–present)
- **Penny Software** — Lead Engineer (Jan 2024–Aug 2025)
- **Penny Software** — Product Specialist, hybrid engineering + product (Apr 2022–Dec 2023)
- **Penny Software** — Full Stack Developer (Jun 2020–Mar 2022)
- **Manaraah** — Senior Full Stack Developer (Jan 2020–Jun 2020)
- **WeCP** — Software Development Engineer (Jan 2019–Jan 2020)
- **Reubro International** — Junior Programmer (Aug 2018–Jan 2019)

## Skills & Stack

**Frontend:** Angular, React, Next.js
**Backend:** Node.js, NestJS, Express
**Data:** MongoDB, AWS DynamoDB
**Cloud & DevOps:** AWS, GCP, Docker, GitHub Actions
**Languages:** TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, HTML/CSS
**AI & Tooling:** Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, LLM APIs, AI-augmented workflows

## Education

B.Tech, Electronics and Communication Engineering — National Institute of Technology Calicut (2014–2018)

## Key Metrics & Achievements

- $1B+ GTV safeguarded — architected multi-tenant procurement platform at Penny Software
- 1.5× release cadence acceleration — reworked CI/CD and delivery rituals
- <200ms critical query performance — optimised high-traffic API paths
- ~12 engineers mentored — led cross-functional squad across frontend, backend, and QA

## Open Source

- **@ngx-runtime-i18n** — Angular library for runtime internationalisation (language switch without page reload)
- **API Sandbox** — Browser-based HTTP sandbox for testing API endpoints
- **GitHub Issues Analyzer** — Tool for analysing GitHub issue patterns to surface trends

## Writing

Ashwin publishes long-form technical essays at ashwinsathian.com/writing.

Current posts:
- "Wait, Is Markdown Having a Moment?" — How a 2004 blogging format became the native language of AI (May 2026)
- "Five Years, One Codebase: What Staying Teaches You" — On depth, judgment, and what AI changes (and doesn't) about software tenure (June 2026)
